data.body: CHECKPOINT COMPLETE: Optimized config-paths.sh from 6 subprocess invocations to 2. Implementation: single read-config.sh --batch call replaces 5 individual _cfg_read calls; one --list call handles multi-value format.source_dirs. Batch intermediates (PATHS_APP_DIR etc.) are unset after use to prevent environment pollution. Tests: 28/28 pass (19 existing + 9 new tests covering batch correctness, absent-key defaults, and environment leak prevention). compute-diff-hash.sh timing: 0.51s (well under 3s AC). Files modified: plugins/dso/hooks/lib/config-paths.sh, tests/hooks/test-config-paths.sh.
